comments.comment: During the rebuild of one of our units (Unit 3), there was found to be asbestos containing material used for insulation. The material and suspected material was all removed from the unit and diposed of on an on-site landfill. The mass reported is all waste materials that were diposed of that may or may not have all contained asbestos. Next year will likely not have a reportable level of disposal for asbestos.
